channel.title: MemoryAisle Blog
channel.description: Research-backed writing on protein, body composition, and GLP-1 medications.

item.title: What to Eat on GLP-1: The Complete Food Guide
item.description: Foods to prioritize, foods to limit, protein targets, and a simple plate framework for Ozempic, Wegovy, and Zepbound.

item.title: High-Protein GLP-1 Meal Plan: A 7-Day Menu
item.description: A free 7-day high-protein plan for Ozempic, Wegovy, and Zepbound — easy meals hitting 100g+ protein a day.

item.title: GLP-1 Meals for Low Appetite & Nausea: 20 Gentle Ideas
item.description: Gentle, high-protein meals for low appetite and nausea on Ozempic, Wegovy, or Zepbound.

item.title: Every meal screened. Every allergen blocked.
item.description: MemoryAisle 2.2 introduces a code-level allergy safety system for every meal Mira suggests.

item.title: The GLP-1 cycle: eating with your dose, not against it
item.description: How to plan meals around the trough, the window, and the rebound on a weekly GLP-1 dose.

item.title: Hitting your protein target on a GLP-1 when you can barely eat
item.description: Three strategies for getting enough protein on Wegovy, Ozempic, or Mounjaro — even on tough days.

item.title: 39% of the weight you lose on a GLP-1 is muscle. Here's how to keep it.
item.description: Studies show around 39% of GLP-1 weight loss can be lean mass. Three changes that protect body composition.
